author: zen
description: This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff. A clean timeline calendar with grid-aligned time labels for daily notes and tasks.

manifest.author: zen
manifest.description: A clean timeline calendar with grid-aligned time labels.
manifest.name: Timeline Calendar

name: Timeline Calendar

releases.author: deemsd
releases.description:
## What's Changed

- Fixed community review false-positive dynamic script detections in the release bundle.
- Kept the latest local timeline, agenda, and month view layout refinements.
- Updated release metadata to 1.4.0.
releases.name: Timeline Calendar 1.4.0

releases.author: deemsd
releases.description:
## What's Changed

- Refined Month view spacing for date headers, task rows, and overflow links.
- Moved Month view + more links to the lower area of each date cell with compact spacing.
- Matched Week view day header weight with Month view headers.
- Kept Day and Week timeline layout refinements from the previous release.
releases.name: Timeline Calendar 1.3.0

releases.author: deemsd
releases.description:
## What's Changed

- Align timeline labels with grid lines in Week and Day views.
- Improve Day view all-day area height and background consistency.
- Refine timed event layout and selectable spacing.
- Remove donation/sponsor section from settings.
